jobs.title: Quality Control (Fintech)
jobs.description:
We are seeking a talented Quality Control (Fintech) to join PT INDOSAKU DIGITAL TEKNOLOGI operating in the Agribusiness, Financing, Technology, Fintech, Agritech sector at our Tangerang Selatan, Indonesia location. This is a full-time position. The ideal candidate will work closely with other team members to deliver high-quality work, manage project delivery goals, and contribute to company growth.

Key skills preferred: written communication skills.

jobs.title: Business Development Executive
jobs.description:
We are seeking a talented Business Development Executive to join PT Skema Data Indonesia operating in the IT Services And IT Consulting sector at our Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia location. This is a full-time position. The ideal candidate will work closely with other team members to deliver high-quality work, manage project delivery goals, and contribute to company growth.

Key skills preferred: written and spoken English, work discipline, work collaboratively.
jobs.requirements: written and spoken English, work discipline, work collaboratively

jobs.title: Brand Manager Retail Offline
jobs.description:
We are seeking a talented Brand Manager Retail Offline to join PT. Anugrah Jaya Retailindo operating in the Retail sector at our Jakarta Utara, Indonesia location. This is a full-time position. The ideal candidate will work closely with other team members to deliver high-quality work, manage project delivery goals, and contribute to company growth.

Key skills preferred: team leadership coordination, Project Planning & Execution, Time management and problem solving.
jobs.requirements: team leadership coordination, Project Planning & Execution, Time management and problem solving

jobs.title: Sales Business & Development
jobs.description:
We are seeking a talented Sales Business & Development to join PT KURHANZ TRANS operating in the Transportation, Logistics, Supply Chain And Storage sector at our Jakarta Barat, Indonesia location. This is a full-time position. The ideal candidate will work closely with other team members to deliver high-quality work, manage project delivery goals, and contribute to company growth.

Key skills preferred: Proficiency In English, proficient in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint), strong communication skills (written and verbal), detailed-oriented.
jobs.requirements: Proficiency In English, proficient in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint), strong communication skills (written and verbal), detailed-oriented

jobs.title: Sales Coordinator
jobs.description:

Key skills preferred: written, written communication skills, written and spoken English, written & verbal.
jobs.requirements: written, written communication skills, written and spoken English, written & verbal

jobs.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
